brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Telnyx Owns Network for Reliable HIPAA Voice AI
One Platform for HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI Compliance
Voice AI Engineered for Healthcare Data Security
Low-Latency Voice AI Integrated with Telephony
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI Without Vendor Fragmentation
Secure Patient Calls with Telnyx’s Dedicated Network
Voice AI Compliant with HIPAA and SOC 2 Type II
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI delivers HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI compliance with sub-200ms inference latency by co-locating AI processing with telephony infrastructure.
Manage patient communications securely across 140+ countries on a platform with 99.999% uptime and full ownership of the network, eliminating third-party vendor risks.
Consolidate voice AI and telephony into one platform built for healthcare providers requiring strict HIPAA compliance and fast, reliable patient interactions.
Our network ownership ensures no reselling delays. Voice AI processing occurs within the telephony network for latency under 200 milliseconds, meeting healthcare security standards.
Telnyx provides a single platform solution with HIPAA-ready voice AI, backed by SOC 2 Type II certification and PCI compliance to secure sensitive patient data.
